hypothesis: A continuation scheme that starts XRD-based gradient optimization from pseudo-Voigt peaks with 10×-inflated Caglioti widths (U,V,W) and exponentially anneals them to nominal values will increase StructureMatcher recovery rates by at least 50% versus fixed-width cosine-similarity optimization at σl=0.1 and by at least 25% at σc=0.05 on the MP20 subset used here.
